REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS PETITION AS CURRENTLY ASSERTED IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PETITIONER'S OPTIONS OF COMPLIANCE AVAILABLE PER SF PLANNING CODE 415 HAVE BEEN LIMITED TO 7 ON-SITE BMR UNITS SINCE 2003. SEE DEFENDANT'S RJN, EX. D, PAGE 2, PARAGRAPH B; EX. E, "EXHIBIT A," PARAGRAPHS 13-16; EX. H, LAST SENTENCE OF PARAGRAPH 1. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT PETITIONER FAILS TO PROVIDE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT PETITIONER HAS A RIGHT TO PICK AND CHANGE THE MODE OF COMPLIANCE WITH THE INCLUSIONARY HOUSING REQUIREMENTS AT ANY TIME DURING THE LIFE-TIME OF THE PROJECT.

calendar.matters:
AMENDED DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Edward W. Suman, esq. (650-583-3200) for Petitioner/opposing party Winfield International Inc.
Kristen A. Jensen, esq. (415-554-4615) Deputy City Attorney for Respondent/Moving party CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
Court reporter: Tamara Willat CSR #4609 (415-272-1753).

ARGUED by Petitioner Notice of Penalty given on Feb. 08, 2017. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's AMENDED DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Petitioner's claims are barred by Statute of Limitations and Res Judicata. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Tamara Willat CSR #4609 (415-272-1753). (D501)

AMENDED DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2017 Continued To Oct-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's AMENDED DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is Continued to October 11, 2017. Moving party to provide courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than October 2, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Sep-05-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. This petition as currently asserted is barred by the Statute of Limitations. Petitioner's options of compliance available per SF Planning Code 415 have been limited to 7 on-site BMR units since 2003. See Defendant's RJN, Ex. D, page 2, paragraph B; Ex. E, "Exhibit A," paragraphs 13-16; Ex. H, last sentence of paragraph 1. The Court also notes that Petitioner fails to provide any authority for the proposition that Petitioner has a right to pick and change the mode of compliance with the inclusionary housing requirements at any time during the life-time of the project.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
